title: Magical Tacos
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make taco recipe with a magical twist. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the fish on the baking sheet and season with the magical taco seasoning.
Bake the fish for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Warm the taco shells according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the lime juice over medium heat.
Add the diced tomatoes and chopped cilantro to the pan.
Simmer the mixture for 2-3 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of the cooked fish onto a warmed shell.
Top with a spoonful of the tomato-cilantro mixture, some crumbled queso fresco, and sliced avocado.
